cherry_assistant.description: Built-in Cherry Studio advisor. Diagnose issues, guide operations, collect FAQs, submit bugs/feature requests, and search/create Skills

workspace_status.inaccessible: ワークスペースパスにアクセスできません: {{path}}
workspace_status.missing: ワークスペースパスが存在しません: {{path}}
workspace_status.not_directory: ワークスペースパスがディレクトリではありません: {{path}}

appMenu.toggleDevTools: 開発者ツールを切り替え
appMenu.toggleFullscreen: 全画面表示を切り替え

factory_reset.arm_failed_message:
[to be translated]:Cherry Studio could not record the data reset state in {{path}}.

Starting now could erase data you create later, so the app will quit instead.

Please check disk space and file permissions, then start Cherry Studio again.
factory_reset.clear_failed_message:
[to be translated]:Cherry Studio erased its data but could not save the reset completion to {{path}}.

Starting now would erase anything you create on the next launch, so the app will quit instead.

Please check disk space and file permissions, then start Cherry Studio again.
factory_reset.detail: [to be translated]:This cannot be undone. The app will relaunch immediately and erase all chats, assistants, knowledge bases, files, and settings on startup.
factory_reset.incomplete_message:
[to be translated]:Cherry Studio could not remove some of its data during the data reset.

The app will start with whatever remains. Please check file permissions (or antivirus locks) and run Data Reset again from Settings.
factory_reset.message: [to be translated]:Erase all data and factory reset Cherry Studio?
factory_reset.title: [to be translated]:Factory Reset

paintings.generate_failed: 画像の生成に失敗しました
paintings.image_mix_failed: 画像の混合に失敗しました

callback.message: このページを閉じてCherry Studioに戻ることができます
callback.title: 認証成功

tray.show_quick_assistant: クイックアシスタント
